sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current state:
# Green dot at rows 42-43, cols 12-13
# Red shape has outline (unsolved)
# Need to test if green dot position controls object placement

# First, let's move green dot to left side (cols 10-11)
result = action(['LEFT'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Green dot after LEFT: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
        break

# Now click red shape
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 19, 'col': 48}])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print(f"\nAfter clicking red shape: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")

# Check red block position
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'R' and n['pixels'] > 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Red block: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
        break

# Check green dot position
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Green dot: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
        break

# Check left panel
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nLeft panel rows 28-35:")
for r in range(28, 35):
    print(f"  Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][5:25]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
